title: cotula alpina
intro: Cotula alpina, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, due to its anti-inflammatory and carminative effects. The health benefits of Cotula alpina include its ability to soothe digestive discomfort, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Cotula alpina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
